theme_archetype.description: A high-end, cinematic workspace for evaluating exam booklets. Feels like a precision forensic tool rather than a generic SaaS.

rules.H1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight text-foreground not-italic
rules.H2: font-serif text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight text-foreground italic
rules.eyebrows_labels_badges_table_headers: font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[10px] md:text-[11px] text-muted-foreground

textures_and_effects.film_grain: SVG feTurbulence overlay. Create a fixed div z-50 pointer-events-none with opacity 0.025 and an SVG background url using fractalNoise.
textures_and_effects.scan_beam: 1px champagne hairline beam divider: h-px w-full bg-beam shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(230,192,117,0.5)]
textures_and_effects.webgl_hero: WebGL dithered-waves shader hero: Champagne gold waves ([0.902, 0.753, 0.459]), Bayer 8x8 ordered dithering, retro/CRT look. Opacity 0.3 behind hero with radial warm glow + bottom fade. If true WebGL is overkill, use a highly textured looping video or CSS radial-gradient with the exact colors and film grain.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must shift foreground color slightly or increase border opacity. Buttons get a subtle inner glow.
motion_and_interactions.stagger: Use Framer Motion to motion-stagger entrances (staggerChildren: 0.1) and scroll reveals.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-beam text-[#050505] font-sans font-medium px-6 py-2 hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full glass text-foreground font-sans px-6 py-2 hover:bg-white/[0.05] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.attributes: All buttons MUST include data-testid attributes

cards.role_selection: Group hover effects: on hover, a pseudo-element with bg-beam/10 sweeps across the card, and border brightens.

split_pane_workspace.left_pane_viewer: flex-1 relative overflow-auto border-r border-white/[0.06] bg-black/50. Includes zoom controls (glass floating toolbar), document canvas.
split_pane_workspace.right_pane_evaluation: w-[400px] shrink-0 bg-popover flex flex-col overflow-auto border-l border-white/[0.06] p-6 gap-6
split_pane_workspace.divider: Interactive resizer with ScanBeam motif on drag.

status_pills_badges.base: font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-full border

tables.header: font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[10px] text-muted-foreground border-b border-white/[0.06] pb-2 text-left

sidebar_rail.container: w-16 h-screen flex flex-col items-center py-6 bg-[var(--sidebar)] border-r border-white/[0.06]
sidebar_rail.icons: text-sidebar-foreground hover:text-[var(--sidebar-accent)] transition-colors duration-300 cursor-pointer mb-6

image_urls.description: Black crumpled macro paper texture. Use as a multiply/screen blend layer for tactical document feel.
Abstract dark waves. Apply CSS filters (sepia, hue-rotate) to match the #e6c075 champagne gold if WebGL is unavailable.
Dark fingerprint scanner motif. Useful for the authentication or 'AI thinking' evaluation state.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure champagne text (#e6c075) and warm bone text (#f0ece4) meet minimum 4.5:1 ratio against #050508.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, inputs, links, and workspace toggles MUST use `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid="workspace-zoom-in"`, `data-testid="eval-submit-btn"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config exactly with the CSS variables mapped. Note that colors in Tailwind will map to these CSS vars.
2. Add a global CSS setup that defines the `:root` variables provided in `global_colors.css_variables`.
3. Set up the 3 fonts via Google Fonts or Next/Font imports (Libre Caslon Text, Instrument Serif, DM Mono). NOTE: Set 'sans' to Libre Caslon Text in Tailwind config to make it the default.
4. Create the utility classes for `.glass`, `.glass-strong`, `.glass-nav` in the global CSS.
5. Build the `FilmGrain` component as a fixed full-screen SVG overlay, set pointer-events: none and z-index: 50.
6. Build the split-pane workspace as the primary view, enforcing the 'left side document viewer, right side evaluation tools' pattern.
7. Only use Champagne Gold (#e6c075) as the accent color. NO blue defaults from Shadcn.
8. Override Shadcn component styles: Radii must be `1rem` (rounded-2xl) for cards, and full for buttons. Remove generic borders, use the exact `border-white/[0.06]` utility.
9. ALWAYS use data-testid on all interactive elements to support robust automated testing.
